summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Digital Twin Agent installer download flow. Verified that the 'Download Agent' button now works correctly after placing pre-built binaries in /app/dist/ and configuring PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components are functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: All dist files present (DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe 14MB, agent.exe 45MB, uninstaller.exe 138MB)
Backend: GET /api/agent/installer/info returns available:true, bundle:true, bundle_size=196MB, version=2.1.0
Backend: POST /api/agent/installer/download-init returns download_token (JWT), pairing_code (DT-XXXX-XXXX format), filename ending in .zip, is_bundle:true
Backend: GET /api/agent/installer/download with token returns HTTP 200, content-type application/zip, Content-Length matches actual bytes (205514753 bytes)
Backend: Downloaded ZIP contains all 6 files in correct structure (install.cmd, bundle.json, README.txt, payload/DigitalTwinAgentSetup_<code>.exe, payload/agent.exe, payload/uninstaller.exe)
Backend: install.cmd contains correct BACKEND_URL (https://safe-import-pro.preview.emergentagent.com) and pairing code
Backend: GET /api/agent/installer/verify returns paired:false, device:null (correct state before installation)
Backend: Auth checks work correctly (401 for unauthenticated requests, 401 for invalid tokens)
Backend: ZIP integrity verified with unzip -t (no errors detected)
Backend: Backwards compatibility with Bearer token auth works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard loaded correctly with 'Download Agent' button visible
Frontend: 'Download Agent' button clickable and opens dialog
Frontend: Dialog shows installer as AVAILABLE (NOT 'Installer not built yet')
Frontend: Download button is enabled and shows correct text
Frontend: Size information displayed (196 MB ZIP bundle)
Frontend: Bundle/ZIP installation instructions displayed correctly
